tool_args.content:
# PowerShell script to apply brain_episode_v1 diff
Copy-Item -Path brain_server.py -Destination brain_server_backup.py
patch brain_server.py < brain_episode_v1.diff
py_compile brain_server.py
# Additional smokes tests would be invoked here
